_README: ADDITIVE snippet for ~/.codex/hooks.json — an alternative to the config.toml form (Codex accepts either; it merges both if present). COMPOSE with your existing hooks; do not overwrite. mesh-inject must be on PATH (or replace command with an absolute interpreter path). The hook is fail-closed: any error exits 0, so it never blocks a Codex session. Codex pipes session JSON (including cwd) to the hook on stdin; agentixmesh reads that cwd to address the right mailbox. See hooks/codex/README.md.
